spec:
## Goal
Add a read-only endpoint that returns one task by id.

## Constraints
- Reuse the existing CRUD router pattern.
- Return the TaskModel payload unchanged.
- Keep the route behind task:read.
dod_checklist: GET /v1/tasks/{id} returns 200 with the task payload.

dod_checks.item: GET /v1/tasks/{id} returns 200 with the task payload.

learnings.title: Schema contracts must encode explicit output artifacts
learnings.what_happened: A coding-task contract was ambiguous about which execution artifacts had to be returned.
learnings.what_learned: Typed output fields keep validators and downstream agents aligned.
learnings.action_rule: Model required output artifacts explicitly in the contract schema.
learnings.applies_when: A task handoff depends on downstream validation or reuse.
learnings.does_not_apply_when: The task is exploratory and has no durable outputs.
